entities.name: ROOT-ZONE SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: Moisture content in the soil area where roots are active, which the study aims to estimate

entities.name: SURFACE MULTISPECTRAL SENSING
entities.description: A technique using multispectral sensors at the surface to collect data for estimating soil moisture

entities.name: THERMAL SENSING
entities.description: A technique using thermal sensors at the surface to collect data for estimating soil moisture

entities.name: DOOKIE EXPERIMENT SITE
entities.description: The specific site in Victoria, Australia where the hydrometeorological and spectral datasets were collected

entities.name: VICTORIA, AUSTRALIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the Dookie experiment site is located

entities.name: UNIVERSITY OF MELBOURNE'S DOOKIE EXPERIMENTAL FARM
entities.description: The institutional farm where the tower sites and datasets were located

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: One of the vegetation types from which datasets were collected during the cropping seasons

entities.name: CANOLA
entities.description: One of the vegetation types from which datasets were collected during the cropping seasons

entities.name: GRAZED PASTURE
entities.description: One of the vegetation types from which datasets were collected during the cropping seasons

entities.name: LATENT HEAT FLUX
entities.description: A measurement of the energy used for evaporation and transpiration, collected at 30-min frequency

entities.name: SENSIBLE HEAT FLUX
entities.description: A measurement of the energy transferred between the surface and the atmosphere by conduction and convection, collected at 30-min frequency

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: Layer-average moisture data collected at profile depths ranging from 0 to 120 cm

entities.name: AIR TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Atmospheric temperature data collected from two locations in the study area

entities.name: WIND SPEED
entities.description: The speed of the wind collected from two locations in the study area

entities.name: WIND DIRECTION
entities.description: The direction of the wind collected from two locations in the study area

entities.name: RELATIVE HUMIDITY
entities.description: The amount of water vapor present in air expressed as a percentage of the amount needed for saturation

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: The amount of rain or snow collected from two locations in the study area

entities.name: LONGWAVE RADIATION
entities.description: Incoming and outgoing longwave radiation data collected from the study area

entities.name: SHORTWAVE RADIATION
entities.description: Incoming and outgoing shortwave radiation data collected from the study area

relationships.source: UNIVERSITY OF MELBOURNE'S DOOKIE EXPERIMENTAL FARM
